description.tp: pipi li wile moku e telo.
pipi jaki li tawa lon kon.
jan Ton li open e poki.

npcs.personality: elder mentor; warm, unhurried; hands the player their first poki and lets them pick a starter.
an old friend, quietly sad; a callback to the hungry-friend beat.
leans on the well, ruminating about water.

text.tp: o wile jo e ijo wan.

npcs.personality: cocky rival — took a starter too; wants to prove he's stronger.
stoic mountain guardian; terse, austere. Blocks the path north until beaten. Teaches sewi on victory.
a hiker caught off-guard by the cold; pauses along the path to catch breath.

text.tp: jan Ton li lon ma sewi.

text.en: There's snow on the mountain top.
text.tp: ko lete li lon sewi nena.

main_spine.summary: Player chooses their starter from jan Sewi.
jan Ike challenges the player at the end of the route.
Clear jan Telo's gym at the next village.
